glue.table.serdeinfo.CfnAbout: Information about a serialization/deserialization program (SerDe) that serves as an extractor and loader.

glue.table.serdeinfo.Parameters.Description: These key-value pairs define initialization parameters for the SerDe.

glue.table.serdeinfo.SerializationLibrar.Description: Usually the class that implements the SerDe. An example is `org.apache.hadoop.hive.serde2.columnar.ColumnarSerDe`.
